attributes.content:
## Overview

The Shipment card gives the workspace a structured home for package shipment with carrier, tracking number, status, origin/destination, and estimated delivery.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Shipment acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Contact]]** -- Shipment often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Shipment frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.
- **[[Calendar Event]]** -- Calendar Event can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Shipment.
- **[[Task]]** -- Shipment often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Shipment can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Itinerary / Trip]]** -- Itinerary / Trip can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Shipment.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Shipment as the structured home for package shipment with carrier, tracking number, status, origin/destination, and estimated delivery and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Shipment when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Shipment stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
